design_rationale: The schema decomposes landing into dense positional guidance (centering), attitude stability, horizontal velocity suppression near ground, vertical descent quality, and fuel penalties. A single terminal event rewards simultaneous gentle contact with both legs, low vertical/horizontal speeds, and upright attitude. This separates continuous shaping from sparse success and encourages efficient, stable landings.
assumptions: landing pad is at x=0 and near y=0
safe contact velocity thresholds are 0.2 for both vx and vy
fuel penalties are small enough not to prevent necessary thrust
risk_notes: no explicit bounce or crash penalty; agent may bounce after event if it occurs briefly
lack of max episode length reward may lead to indefinite hovering
